description: Style Note rasasi impresses and flatters your senses with their unique fragrances that last long and keep you smelling fresh. These are fragrances that will please the royals just as it would appeal to your more earthy senses. Each and every one of their perfumes are keepers. Product Details Rasasi Chastity is a perfume spray for women which has a green, flowery and musky fragrance. The top notes are green accents, marine notes and lemon. Middle notes are rose, jasmine and orange blossom. Base notes have musky elements. The perfume comes in an elegant and curvy glass flask. Size 100 ml
